name: Seafood Coating Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a small airtight container and label it as Seafood Coating Mix.
3. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
4. To prepare breaded seafood: In a pie plate or shallow dish, combine 1 tablespoon of the mix with 1/2 cup unbleached flour.
5. Coat fish fillets or other seafood pieces thoroughly with the mixture.
6. Pan fry in butter until golden brown, or preheat oil in a deep fryer to 375°F (190°C) and fry for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown.
